questions.question:
The hamming distance between the octets of \( \textsf{0xAA} \) and \( \textsf{0x55} \) is



Computer Networks: ISRO CSE 2011 | Question: 48

Which of the following is true?



Computer Networks: ISRO CSE 2023 | Question: 3
options: Both Parity and Cyclic Redundancy Check are error correcting codes
Both Parity and Low Density Parity Check Code are error correcting codes
Both Reed-Solomon code and Low Density Parity Check Code are error correcting codes
Both Cyclic Redundancy Check and Low Density Parity Check Code are error correcting codes
questions.correct_answer: Both Reed-Solomon code and Low Density Parity Check Code are error correcting codes
